hints.text: Plates **yellow front AND back** (vanity: white w/ blue letters)

shared_with.note: The only other southern-African country with predominantly yellow rears (but white fronts there).

hints.text: Drives **left**; ALL coverage = **white pickup w/ a short front antenna leaning slightly LEFT**
hints.uniq_note: No other southern-African country has this car; Oman's similar antenna never leans left (often clearly right).

shared_with.diff: Leaning LEFT → Namibia; right → Oman (and Oman drives right).

hints.text: Single **yellow outer + white centre lines** (southern-Africa scheme)
Green direction signs w/ yellow road numbers; Namibia uses **A/B/C/D/M (+F) roads** — South Africa uses N & R
hints.uniq_note: C/D/M/F prefixes = Namibia within the green-sign region.

hints.text: Former **German colony**: German place names + older German-style buildings
Small **stone bollards** at intersections & roadsides; round metal bins painted **green-white** (some roads: blue-white) at rest stops

Coverage mostly **main roads** (map incl. pavement type + driving direction); **area codes** for urban rounds; **car-blur meta**: blurred car in the north only NW of Ondangwa; blurred on unpaved = B1 side roads/towns; Noordoewer↔Aussenkehr = unblurred (blur ≈ 2024 coverage — caution)
**D-roads grouped by first digit**: 3-digit (D203) = far south; 4-digit starting 1 → 2 → 3 as you go north

bullets: Tall lush trees both sides → north (greener = further N-NE)
Oshakati pocket: farmland + very light sand + Hyphaene fan palms
East of Windhoek: Botswana-like flat dry, reddish soil, golden grass, acacias
West & south: dry mountains/hills; NW: greener shrub-covered mountains
South of Tsumeb: the lushest, fully green pocket
Around Windhoek: dry rolling hills w/ yellow grass + dead-looking bushes
Coastal sand (+ dunes): Swakopmund & north + Lüderitz/Oranjemund pockets
SE: countless NW-SE red sand ridges — 'rollercoaster' roads
Tall PINK dunes: east of Sossusvlei

hints.text: **Vineyards → only around Aussenkehr** (ZA border); baity agricultural fields just west of Mariental

bullets: Only 2 divided roads: A1 Windhoek↔Okahandja (savanna) + SE of Swakopmund (coastal sand)
B1 south of Grunau: desolate N-NE desert road, minimal vegetation
B1 w/o outer yellows: Grunau↔Keetmanshoop (hillier, worse quality), cloudy bit north of Keetmanshoop, Gibeon↔Mariental (flat N-NE)
Gibeon↔Tses: wide shoulders + excellent pavement
B1 Mariental↔Rehoboth: NW angle, sun SE
Around Rehoboth→Windhoek: more vegetation + pointed lone hills
B1 north of Okahandja: northbound, bright sun N-NW; two pointy mountains west near Sukses
B2 NE of Swakopmund: sandy soil + ridge east (hazy near town); Karibib↔Usakos: sunrise + thin clouds; east of Karibib: clear, wide shoulders, E-NE
B4 east of Lüderitz: blindingly bright sand + railway south; east of Aus: table mountains; Kuibis plateau: very red empty soil
Seeheim↔Keetmanshoop: mountains always close + railway south
B6 Windhoek→Gobabis: orange soil + green grass, never clear sky
B8: light grainy pavement, E-NE, vegetated north
C14: unpaved, blanket clouds north / clear south (paved south of Bethanien)
C19: very red soil + golden grass tufts, dark clouds north
C22: fresh-cut orange grass tufts + rocky hills hugging the road, blinding low sun east
C13: rugged mountain formation west + wispy clouds hiding the sun
C34 (coast): dark sand streaks in endless sand + unique white bollards w/ 2 yellow front / 1 red back reflectors
C35 north: red-tinted grainy pavement + green savanna + low cumulus; south of C41: worse unpaved, S-SE; NW of Kamanjab: dramatic clouds + orange horizon; rugged formation west on some parts
C38: spotty cloud blanket, sun faint north
C39: wide valley w/ small green hills (mostly north), N-NE
C40: NW angle, cumulus, sun setting west near Kamanjab
C43: impressive red table mountains + light gravel
C44: wide sandy tree-lined, E-SE, driving WEST (D3301 similar but redder + driving east)
C47: even wider, redder, NE angle driving SW
C49 (panhandle): poor pavement, white-only/faded lines, low sun west
D3600/Mpungu road: light grainy pavement + nearly invisible faded yellows, N-S/NE
Northern roads w/o outer yellows: C46 (NW-SE; poor E-W bit near Ruacana), C41/M123 (cloudier), B10 west of Eenhana + east of Nkurenkuru (low sun)
Windhoek: by far the biggest & richest — high-rises, gated hillside houses, white street signs, NW slums
Gobabis: N-S grid, red soil, mostly unpaved, green street signs w/ silver frames, blue bins
Swakopmund/Walvis Bay: flat sandy streets, palms + Norfolk pines, square signposts; white-blue containers + yellow downtown lamps → Swakopmund
Henties Bay: like the above but poorer, unpaved, cloudy, yellow lamps everywhere
Langstrand: pink brick sidewalks + always overcast
Lüderitz: light rocky hillsides everywhere
Oranjemund: neat E-W grid, Norfolk pines, blue street markers
Aussenkehr: orange thatched fences/huts on a hillside (Noordoewer similar but flat, w/ a cliffside SW in South Africa)
Rosh Pinah: dry mountains NE + SW; Aus: rocky barren hills (smooth north, rugged south)
Rundu: deep light bumpy sand streets w/ tyre tracks
Opuwo: orange green-covered mountains around; Otavi: NE-SW grid between distant ranges
Karibib: dark Erongo silhouette north; Usakos: striated ridge SSE + red-tinted hill east
Uis: Mt Brandberg's crown outline NW + white open-pit mines; Ariamsvlei: lone flat-top hill + dark red soil
